programmes.show_description: In order - 14 videos that hit the top of the US chart in 1977. Some are obvious, but there are a few surprises along the way! Marilyn McCoo anyone?
60 minutes of power pop and rock! Earplugs at the ready as we rewind to 1977 with Rod Stewart, Boston, Ram Jam and the Sex Pistols!
Experience the magic of 1977 & dance yourself through a long year of disco, pop, soul, country, rock & punk. With ELO & Abba, Queen & Kenny Rogers!
10 artists that had a single big song in 1977 - then never darkened the UK Top 20 ever again! Remember Ram Jam, Patsy Gallant, Meri Wilson or The Floaters?
Experience the magic of 1977 & dance yourself through a long year of disco, pop, soul, country, rock & punk. With ELO & Abba, Queen & Kenny Rogers!
If you thought 1977 was all about punk - you might want to think again! Simon Bates brings you a Silver Jubilee year full of pop, soul, disco, country, love & a little bit of rock!
From the era of glam rock, new wave and disco, it's all the hits from just one decade - the 1970s! Platform boots and flares at the ready?
What 70s songs have streamed over a billion times worldwide? There are lots from Rumours & Queen's Greatest, but the songs at 4, 9, 12 & 18 might surprise you!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Blackburn's your man for the ultimate early 70s party playlist. How about some pure pop cheese from big names and forgotten acts that'll have you singing your head off? Let's bop!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
What was in the Top 10 during the Easter holiday in the 70s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 1970 to 1979, with ABBA, Blondie, 10cc, Slade, Kate Bush, Mud, Squeeze, and more!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Come prepared, as those vocal chords are going to see a lot of action as we spend 3 nostalgic hours with Pat Sharp's 70s house party. All gatecrashers welcome!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
A hell-raising 90 minutes of Glam including some rare gems from Sweet, Slade, T.Rex, David Bowie & Suzi Q. If it's inappropriate - then flaunt it!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
The voice of your childhood Derek Griffiths with 40 of those tunes you pestered your parents to buy - all top pop moments that still bring a smile & happy memories of school days!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
The men of disco - but who's going to be our number 1? With Andy Gibb, Heatwave, Michael Jackson, Elton John & The Average White Band.
If you don't get up and dance, you aren't human! Disco was the best floor show in town & once again it's time to get up & get lost in the pulse!
Classic love songs from the NOW That's What I Call Music archive.
Simon Bates with the ultimate countdown of 70s love songs. 100 songs with heartfelt vocals, lush strings & big breakdowns in an 8 hour marathon! Expect Chicago, Eric Carmen & 10cc.
Classic love songs from the NOW That's What I Call Music archive.
Twenty-five beautiful breakup, sad and bittersweet love songs. With Gilbert O'Sullivan, Cliff Richard, Mary MacGregor, Leo Sayer and Elton John.
We didn't yet call them Power Ballads, but some masters of the genre - Boston, Toto & Whitesnake - were already at it! Simes has twenty-five power pop love songs and ballads - in order.
Three hours of up-tempo feel-good songs about love - spanning the whole decade! Get your dancin' shoes on with The Jacksons, Abba, Elton, Anita Ward and John Paul Young.
Classic love songs from the NOW That's What I Call Music archive.
What was in the Top 10 during the Easter holiday in the 70s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 1970 to 1979, with ABBA, Blondie, 10cc, Slade, Kate Bush, Mud, Squeeze, and more!
